era: 1985-1992. Proto-Metal/Proto-Grunge. E=7 -- heavy, dark, massive riff architecture. U-District, Seattle. C/Z Records.
members: Jack Endino (guitar -- producer, most important in Seattle music history)
Matt Cameron (drums, early period -- later Soundgarden, Pearl Jam)

jack_endino_production_record.philosophy: Minimum interference. Document what the band sounds like in a room. Real drums, real amplifiers, real performances.

landmark_productions.label: Sub Pop
landmark_productions.note: Pre-Nevermind document. Endino as witness to the beginning.

landmark_productions.label: Sub Pop
landmark_productions.note: Touch Me I'm Sick. Sonic definition of early Seattle grunge. Production reference document for the genre.
Pre-A&M, pre-major label. Raw and heavy.

jack_endino_production_record.significance: Most important producer in Seattle music history. His production choices became the genre's sonic reference point. The 'Seattle sound' (heavy guitar, prominent drums, dry vocals) is in significant part an Endino production signature.

matt_cameron_trajectory.soundgarden: 1986-1997, reunion 2010-2017. Ultramega OK 1988, Louder Than Love 1989, Badmotorfinger 1991, Superunknown 1994, Down on the Upside 1996.
matt_cameron_trajectory.pearl_jam: 1998-present. Binaural 2000 onward. Longer tenure than Soundgarden.
matt_cameron_trajectory.note: Skin Yard is the Cameron origin document.

deep_six_compilation.label: C/Z Records
deep_six_compilation.significance: Root document of the grunge lineage. All six bands represent threads of the Seattle underground. Pre-commercial document of what would become grunge.
deep_six_compilation.andrew_wood_note: Malfunkshun's Andrew Wood died 1990. Mother Love Bone thread.

theory_nodes.concept: JACK ENDINO: THE MOST IMPORTANT PRODUCER IN SEATTLE MUSIC HISTORY. Musician (Skin Yard guitarist) and producer simultaneously. Minimum interference philosophy at Reciprocal Recording. Nirvana Bleach ($606.17), Mudhoney Superfuzz Bigmuff, early Soundgarden, TAD, Screaming Trees Sweet Oblivion (co-production, degree 261), plus hundreds of Pacific Northwest bands across four decades. The 'Seattle sound' is in significant part an Endino production signature.
theory_nodes.description: Jack Endino: definitive documentation of the most important producer in Seattle music history.

theory_nodes.concept: Matt Cameron origin: Skin Yard before Soundgarden and Pearl Jam. Skin Yard (1985-1986) is the origin document for Cameron's drumming career. The dynamic precision and technical proficiency of Badmotorfinger and Superunknown were developed here, in a band most Soundgarden fans have never heard.
theory_nodes.description: Skin Yard as the origin document for Matt Cameron's drumming trajectory.

theory_nodes.concept: Deep Six (1986, C/Z Records): the grunge root document. Six bands: Melvins, U-Men, Soundgarden, Green River (later Mudhoney + Pearl Jam precursors), Skin Yard, Malfunkshun. The photograph of the entire grunge lineage before it was a lineage. C/Z was there at the origin. The engine has now documented multiple Deep Six bands: U-Men (Tom Price in Gas Huffer, 262), Soundgarden (previous degrees), Skin Yard (264).
theory_nodes.description: Deep Six (1986): the root document of grunge. Skin Yard's position in it.

theory_nodes.concept: E=7 FOUR-DEGREE STREAK (261-264). Screaming Trees: psychedelic density. Gas Huffer: garage speed. Treepeople: post-hardcore melodic complexity. Skin Yard: proto-metal riff heaviness. Four entirely different acoustic mechanisms, same energy level. The engine's E-scale measures presence and impact reachable by multiple routes. This is the longest E=7 streak in the engine to this point.
theory_nodes.description: E=7 four-degree streak: four mechanisms, one energy level. Longest E=7 run in engine.

theory_nodes.concept: Proto-grunge vs. grunge: the commercial distinction. Skin Yard (1985-1992) sounded like what people would call grunge before 'grunge' was a commercial category. The sound existed; the label did not. When Nevermind broke in 1991, the music world retroactively labeled an ecosystem that had been active since 1985. Skin Yard is the before-the-name version of the genre they helped create.
theory_nodes.description: Proto-grunge: the sound before the commercial label.

cross_references.relationship: C/Z Records. Label thread 263-264. Both on the label that released Deep Six.
Jack Endino thread: co-produced Sweet Oblivion (261) and is Skin Yard guitarist (264). Endino runs through four degrees.
Tom Price was in U-Men, a Deep Six band. Deep Six roster documented in engine across 262 and 264.

sps_pair.pairing_note: E=7 (Skin Yard) + E=2 (submarine canyon). Maximum energy contrast: proto-metal heaviness vs. deep infrasonic water flow. The loudest local band vs. the quietest deep-water sound in the engine. Surface noise and deep silence.

milestones: JACK ENDINO FULLY DOCUMENTED: most important producer in Seattle music history
MATT CAMERON ORIGIN DOCUMENT: Skin Yard before Soundgarden and Pearl Jam
DEEP SIX (1986) ROOT DOCUMENT: full compilation context
E=7 FOUR-DEGREE STREAK COMPLETE (261-264): longest in engine
